extra.reason: Implemented: dusk/dawn gate (lamp_night_factor on sun altitude) across all three lamp feeds + reach scale 1.6→2.4. Committed in e6e390f (swept into sibling commit by a cross-session git race; content intact).

Implemented /devhud tab-cycle visualizer (ffxi-client/src/view_native/target_list_hud.rs): linked-list-ordered candidate panel from build_tab_candidates, current target highlighted, party/pet tier tagged, plus a perf line (snap us / rebuilds-per-sec / frame-max ms) instrumenting the snapshot rebuild. Compiles, clippy-clean, tab-cycle unit tests pass. Not yet run live (needs server+DAT).
Fixed in lens_flare.wgsl: screen UV now derived from framebuffer coord, so the overscanned flare quad no longer drifts the glare off the sun disc.

Implemented ZoneLineDisplay (Off default/Pillar/Gate) in GraphicsSettings; /zoneline slash command; auto-rendered Graphics-menu row; mode-aware sync_zone_lines_system with Gate drawing the real oriented scale_x*scale_z+rotation footprint; lifecycle reset on InGame re-entry. Tests + clippy + fmt green.

Phases 1-3 done: ParticleGeneratorDef+KeyFrameTrack parser (ffxi-dat/particle_gen.rs), ParticleSimulator CPU stream (ffxi-viewer-core/particle_sim.rs) replacing static sprite, ChunkKind::KeyFrame, OnExit drain. Validated vs real Cure/Fire DATs. Phases 4-5 (sec1/sec3 updaters, child gens, variances) tracked separately.

Dropped the is_changed() early-return in update_minimap_image_source (ffxi-viewer-core/src/minimap/mod.rs) so the resolved minimap handle is re-evaluated/assigned every frame (idempotent via image_node.image != h). Fixes blank map after zone-in where the single MinimapState change edge was consumed before the MinimapImage node existed. Build + 20 minimap tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.

Implemented + unit-tested: dead/hidden entities non-cyclable; dead PCs stay click-targetable for Raise; STATUS_TYPE {2,3,4,6,18,20} excluded; fixed status-staleness (decode every tick). Live in-game verification pending.
Fixed this session: 35efe13 (mipmap actor textures), 7635184 (ground_nearest), 1576079 (windowed lamp falloff + softened base).
Fixed this session: 35efe13 (mipmap actor textures), 7635184 (ground_nearest), 1576079 (windowed lamp falloff + softened base).
Fixed this session: 35efe13 (mipmap actor textures), 7635184 (ground_nearest), 1576079 (windowed lamp falloff + softened base).

Implemented: engaged context-menu actions (Switch Target <st> cursor, Disengage, Items in battle), docked above chat, compass/clock beside minimap, submenu ▶ arrow, Check un-gated, global DejaVu Sans Mono UI font. Landed across commits 73b0990 (viewer-core half, swept by concurrent session) + aeb27d3 (client glue + font wiring).
release.yml glob now v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+*; auto-release-on-main creates/checks/emits v${version}. Aligns automation with the existing v0.1.0 tag + the successful workflow_dispatch 0.1.0 release.
Base render scale shipped (#66 closed). FSR1 upscale remains in kuluu-dk5.

DatSetup first-run gate implemented in launcher_ui/dat_setup.rs + wired in mod.rs (state variant, DatGateDone guard, decide_initial_screen routing); reuses ffxi-dat::install_detect (is_ffxi_root/find_ffxi_root/detect). cargo check + fmt + clippy green.

DatSetup first-run gate implemented in launcher_ui/dat_setup.rs + wired in mod.rs (state variant, DatGateDone guard, decide_initial_screen routing); reuses ffxi-dat::install_detect (is_ffxi_root/find_ffxi_root/detect). cargo check + fmt + clippy green.

Non-blocking update-available banner implemented in launcher_ui/updater.rs: background ureq GET to the GitHub releases API (CA-validated; ureq already a runtime dep via ffxi-nav-recast, lock unchanged) vs env!(CARGO_PKG_VERSION); floating banner with Open-release-page/Dismiss. Fails silently, never blocks launch. cargo check + fmt + clippy green.

Done: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc release leg added to release.yml (CXXFLAGS="" neutralises the macOS -isysroot for MSVC), ffxi-mcp/ffxi-mcp-repl dropped from linux+macos packaging, and the dx12 gpu-allocator/windows-0.58 dedup fix validated locally (windows-gnu cross-check, exit 0). Shipped in v0.2.0. Further packaging work (dist/installers/signing) tracked under epic kuluu-91f.
SHA256SUMS release asset + updater sha256 verify; merged to main (78b5c14)
Texture-filtering setting threaded into actor texture path; merged to main (aa43d00)
Per-server recommended/minimum version check + login banner; merged to main (4ef27f2)
Config dir ffxi-mcp->kuluu for launcher + graphics/keybinds/goal stores + agent harness, with flagged migration; merged to main (266b915)
Tab-target vertical sign-flip fix + regression test verified already present in main (input.rs:822); bead was stale-open
Added reusable docked window-nav button in launcher_ui/common.rs; Close (AppExit) on Login+ServerSelect, Back→Login on CharList; wired OnEnter/OnExit. Compiles + clippy clean.

Engage->battle music fixed (current_goal drives engaged) and verified live: zone 240 transition showed engaged_solo:true selecting CombatSolo slot. Live confirmation track was 151 because Windurst's combat slots == zone track; engage detection itself confirmed working.
dirs::config_dir() adopted (native macOS/Windows + spec-correct XDG); legacy ffxi-mcp migration removed; clippy+tests green for ffxi-client/ffxi-mcp

Implemented: MMB zone-prop queue now sorts nearest-player-first; zone-spawn loads deferred beyond draw.world*1.25 (re-checked each frame, never dropped); new cull_mmb_props_by_distance hides loaded props beyond draw.world (hysteresis band keeps them ready before they enter the visible radius). Despawn-unload deliberately omitted (asset handle caches persist per-zone, so it would thrash for negligible gain). Unit tests + fmt/clippy green.

Shipped v2: MMB zone-prop queue sorts nearest-player-first and defers loads beyond GraphicsSettings.view_distance*1.25 (re-checked as player moves). Rendering bounds left to the camera far plane; redundant distance-cull removed. fmt/clippy/tests green.

Event menu now returns Work_Zone[1] as 0x05B EndPara (Signet pick -> option 1), per XiPackets client 0x005B; verified by real-DAT regression test. Implemented in vm.rs/runner.rs/event_dialog.rs/session.rs.
WASD/keyboard movement + local prediction blocked while KO'd via dispatch_movement_system dead-guard; camera retained. Slash/agent movement noted as follow-up.

MMB prop parse (fs read + decrypt + parse_models + DXT decode) now runs on AsyncComputeTaskPool, keyed by (file_id,chunk_idx). process_load_mmb_requests polls completed parses into MmbParseCache, then on the main thread only builds assets + spawns entities, bounded per frame (cost weighted by whether the per-file tex pool exists). Concurrent parses capped at 64; in-flight cleared on zone change alongside the queue. Near-first priority sort + view_distance gate preserved; diagnostics, caches, entity resolution unchanged. viewer-core + client build clean, clippy clean, 8 tests pass.

Implemented: perf/spike monitor split out of TAB CYCLE panel into new perf_hud.rs (frame-time column graph + throttled warn! spike logging). Compiles clean (cargo check + clippy, native-window) and fmt-passes. Runtime/visual verification pending a live LSB session.

Added reset_interaction_flags_on_zone_change (Update, InGame): on snapshot zone_id change, resets AutoRun, LockOn, Target, RestStance. Follow/engage/pathing already reset via reactor ZoneChanged->Idle. WalkMode left intact (deliberate user preference, not transient).
Implemented: /devhud now controls only stage+bottom bars; new in-game Debug submenu toggles Perf/Target Cycle/Mesh Debug/Net Status with [on]/[off] rows. Compiles + clippy clean + menu tests pass.
Follow-up: merged stage bar into single bottom bar (removed top bar); mesh-debug shows enabled hint when not hovering. Two commits.
docs/ROADMAP.md + all drift config removed; references rewired; committed (244bf59) and pushed to origin/main
Model Shadow Casting toggle implemented, tested (374 pass, clippy clean), committed 6250042. Includes Model-row label clarity renames.

Derived base/count from PC_MODEL_IDS slot-0 (dropped duplicated FACE_BASE). Added unit tests pinning the convention; added warn! for resolved-but-unrendered equipment files to diagnose the separate headless-PC observation.
Implemented + unit-tested: observed players' /heal and /sit now drive Heal/Sit rest poses from the broadcast animation byte. Live visual confirm pending.

fits_job + format_jobs off-by-one fixed; regression tests added and passing
Phase 1 layout/grid/nav implemented + unit-tested; visual confirmation pending user GUI

Implemented + unit-tested; clippy clean. In-app visual verification pending (no live server this session).

Fixed: naked default body now loads (slot-prefixed model id 0) + model framed to the right of the preview with the form panel reserved to the left. Committed 06fe0cc on main; builds clean (ffxi-client --features native-window), fmt clean.
Parser + atlas done and verified against the real DAT (orbs extract 14x14 from menu framesus). Bevy upload path exercised by gkv.
Orb wired into clock + DRY VanaWeekday enum; atlas extraction verified 14x14 against real DAT.

Implemented: (1) EquipSlot menu stays open after equip; (2) re-select equipped item unequips via slotID=0 (LSB charutils.cpp:3147); (3) ItemDatRoot now inserted at startup in view_native/mod.rs (was only set in settings-reload, so icons/details never resolved on the play path). Added equipped (E) marker in storage list + 2 LSB-pinned equip_set tests. protocol-conformance-reviewer PASS. fmt+clippy clean, 245 client lib + 134 viewer-core hud tests pass.
Implemented and verified against real retail DATs + XIM reference. Icons/details/descriptions resolve; unequip no longer shows Gil.

Fixed the two straggler sites the WIP missed (ffxi-client test sites were already updated in add281c/79cf892): ffxi-mcp Entity initializers + AgentEvent/AgentCommand kind-label match arms (fishing + char_stats), and ffxi-dat/ui_element identity_op in crop test. scripts/checks.sh fmt+clippy green (clippy --all-targets --workspace -D warnings compiles all test targets).
